products.name: Aerospace and Defense Radomes
products.descriptor: Radomes for air, land, and sea defense platforms with wide frequency range and minimum signal loss

evidence.snippet:
#### Aerospace & Defense Radomes

### Aerospace and Defense Radomes

products.name: Airborne Radome
products.descriptor: Aerodynamically shaped radome to protect radar systems on aircraft

evidence.snippet:
###### Airborne Radome
Airborne radomes are designed to protect radar systems on aircraft. These radomes are typically smaller than naval radomes, and are aerodynamically shaped to reduce drag and improve the aircraft’s performance. Airborne radomes are used for a variety of purposes, including air traffic control, weather monitoring, and military surveillance.

products.name: Composite Radome
products.descriptor: Radome made from advanced composites such as carbon fiber and Kevlar

products.name: TT&C Radomes
products.descriptor: Radomes for Telemetry Tracking & Command subsystems on satellites and spacecraft

evidence.snippet:
#### TT&C Radomes
![](/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/radio.svg)
### TT&C Radomes
We produce RADOMs for Telemetry Tracking & Command subsystems to be used at satellites and spacecrafts. We reduce your maintenance and repair costs by ensuring that your TT&C systems are protected from the corrosive effects of external factors and can operate effectively under all weather conditions.

products.name: Satcom Radomes
products.descriptor: Sandwich radomes for shipboard and fixed-site tactical SATCOM antennas across multiple bands

evidence.snippet:
#### Satcom Radomes
![](/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/satellite-dish.svg)
### Satcom Radomes
We provide excellent quality RADOMs for satellite communication antennas and terminals based on your needs. We design, develop and produce sandwich radomes that are the ideal solution for shipboard and fixed-site tactical SATCOM applications and can function across various SATCOM bands.

products.name: Custom Radomes
products.descriptor: Made-to-order radomes designed to customer-specified size, shape, and material

products.name: Naval Radome
products.descriptor: Dome-shaped radome for shipborne radar systems resistant to marine environments

products.name: Ground Based Radome
products.descriptor: Large dome-shaped radome for ground radar systems covering ATC, military, and weather applications

evidence.snippet: Ground based radomes are used to protect radar systems used for air traffic control, military surveillance, and weather monitoring. These radomes are typically large and dome-shaped, and are designed to withstand harsh environmental conditions, including high winds, lightning strikes, and extreme temperatures. Ground-based radomes are essential for maintaining situational awareness and ensuring safety in a variety of applications.

products.name: Air Traffic Control Radomes
products.descriptor: High-durability radomes for airport and civil aviation radar systems rated to 240–300 km/h wind

evidence.snippet:
#### Air Traffic Control Radomes
![](/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/control-tower.svg)
### Air Traffic Control Radomes
We meet the radom needs of airports, leading radar manufacturers and civil aviation authorities all around the world. With our high quality radomes which have durability against 240-300 km/h wind speed at least, we enable precise measurements with the reliability required by aerospace applications.

products.name: Weather Radomes
products.descriptor: Sandwich radomes for land and ship-based weather radar systems including Dual Polarization Doppler

products.name: Electromagnetic Analysis
products.descriptor: EMI/EMC analysis and RF transmission loss testing for radome performance characterization

evidence.snippet:
Electromagnetic Analysis
](#)
### Electromagnetic Analysis
By performing Electromagnetic Interference (EMI) and Electromagnetic Compatibility (EMC) analyzes and tests, we precisely detect many performance variables such as RF Transmission Loss and Electromagnetic Signal Transmittance.

products.name: Structural Analysis
products.descriptor: FEA-based structural analysis including shock, thermal, static, dynamic, and vibration analysis

evidence.snippet:
Structural Analysis
](#)
### Structural Analysis
We offer structural analysis services where we use the finite element method to calculate the effects of loads and internal forces on the structure. We carry out shock analysis, thermal analysis, static and dynamic analysis and vibration analysis such as harmonic, response spectrum, PSD-Random with precision.

products.name: Ultrasonic Inspection and Repair Services
products.descriptor: Non-destructive ultrasonic testing and repair service for radome composite material homogeneity

evidence.snippet:
Ultrasonic Inspection and Repair Services
](#)
### Ultrasonic Inspection and Repair Services
We control the homogeneity of the material with Ultrasonic Inspection, a completely nondestructive testing method. Using high-frequency sound waves, we detect cracks, gaps and even micro-damages under the surface and perform the necessary repairs.

products.name: System Qualification Services
products.descriptor: Compliance verification and certification consultancy for systems and subsystems

evidence.snippet:
System Qualification Services
](#)
### System Qualification Services
We examine the compliance of your systems and subsystems with business requirements and prepare documents and reports containing the results of the examination. We provide consultancy in certification processes.
